description: This file defines the ReplicationOrchestrator class responsible for orchestrating post-copy replication processes, including EF mappings, throughput setup, and data input replication, within a .NET application. It manages the flow of copying data between source and target assets, handles errors, and logs progress.

classes.name: ReplicationOrchestrator
classes.description: A class that manages the sequence of replication tasks after copying an asset, including EF mappings, throughput setup, and data input values, with logging and error handling.

methods.name: ReplicateAfterCopyAsync
methods.description: Main method that orchestrates the post-copy replication process, aggregating results from individual modules, logging progress, and returning the overall outcome.

methods.name: Aggregate
methods.description: Determines the overall replication status based on individual module results.

methods.name: ReplicateEfMappingsAsync
methods.description: Replicates Entity Framework source mappings from source to target asset.

methods.name: ReplicateThroughputSetupAsync
methods.description: Replicates throughput calculation setup for the target asset across reporting years.

methods.name: ReplicateDataInputAsync
methods.description: Replicates stored data input values from source to target asset.
